never: Never create test files in src/. All test files go in tests/ only.
Never write assert!(true) or assert!(false) as the only assertion. Every test must assert a real observable value.
Never instantiate State structs directly. Use Actor::spawn.
Never call taskfile.mark_done unless cargo test reports N > 0 passing tests with zero failures.
Never skip a test with a comment saying setup is complex. Either write it or mark #[ignore] with a specific reason.
Never touch tests/integration_tests.rs — it already exists and is correct.
Never attempt to spawn TcpClientActor in unit tests — it requires TLS certs and a live broker. Use MockActor instead.
always: Read the source file completely before writing any test for it.
Run cargo check after writing each test file. Fix all errors before moving on.
Test through the mailbox. The Msg enum IS the public API of an Actor.
Spawn mock actors with None as the name to avoid ActorAlreadyRegistered errors in parallel tests.
Prefer proptests for any function that handles strings, byte payloads, or user-supplied input.

current_task.notes: Same actor model approach. Read source first.

locate.description: Fast symbol location. Use FIRST before reading or writing anything.
locate.find_actors: rg -n 'impl Actor for|type Msg =|type Arguments =|pub struct.*Args' $WORKSPACE_ROOT/{crate_path}/src --type rust
locate.find_symbol: rg -n 'pub fn|pub struct|pub enum|pub trait' $WORKSPACE_ROOT/{crate_path}/src --type rust

extract.description: Precise content extraction with line numbers. Use after locate.

cargo.test_unit: cd $WORKSPACE_ROOT && cargo test --package cassini-client --test unit -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -30
cargo.test_props: cd $WORKSPACE_ROOT && cargo test --package cassini-client --test props -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -30
cargo.test_all_no_integration: cd $WORKSPACE_ROOT && cargo test --package cassini-client --test unit --test props -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -30
